THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, DEFENDANT VAL DOBRUSHIN IS THE PREVAILING PARTY AND PLAINTIFF LINH LAI TAKE NOTHING FROM SAID DEFENDANT ON THAT CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY, PLAINTIFF LINH LAI IS THE PREVAILING PARTY AND IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT BARRY JENEH. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF LINH LAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRY JENEH THE SUM OF $32,411 WITH INTEREST THEREON AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID.
